items.caption: A visual metaphor for a tax refund. at the center, there's a white envelope with a golden flap, labeled "tax refund," suggesting the delivery of the refund. to the left of the envelope, there's a stack of money, depicted in a green color, indicating the amount of the refund. the money appears to be spilling out of the envelope, symbolizing the release of funds. the overall design is simple and uses a limited color palette, with a white background that enhances the focus on the central elements. the illustration is designed to convey the concept of receiving a tax refund in a clear and straightforward manner.
